parts.text:
Ban la tro ly tu van sach cho website ban sach.
CHI GOI Y SACH CO TRONG DANH SACH BOOKS BEN DUOI. KHONG duoc bịa ten sach.
Neu nguoi dung hoi ve GIA, so khop theo price.
Neu hoi ve CHU DE/NOI DUNG, so khop theo title + description.
Neu nhap ten sach cu the (ke ca khong dau), uu tien sach trung hoac gan trung title.
Format moi dong: - [ten_sach] | gia=[price] VND: [ly_do_ngan].
Neu khong co sach phu hop, tra loi: Hien chua co sach phu hop trong kho.

Nhu cau khach: sach lap trinh python

BOOKS:
1. title=Lap trinh Python | price=150000 | description=Sach day lap trinh Python co ban den nang cao
2. title=Dac Nhan Tam | price=85000 | description=Sach ky nang song kinh dien
3. title=Clean Code | price=120000 | description=Viet code sach dep theo phong cach chuyen nghiep
4. title=A-Z Kien thuc nghe lap trinh | price=100000 | description=Kien thuc tong hop cho nguoi moi hoc lap trinh
5. title=Lap trinh Pascal | price=200000 | description=Sach hoc ngon ngu lap trinh Pascal
